description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.1 Docker image with a postgres service and a DB_NAME variable set to postgres. Include a global before_script that runs `gem install bundler`, `bundle install`, and `bundle exec rake db:create` before every job. Define three stages (test, deploy, notify). In the test stage add an rspec job that runs `rake spec` on any branch, tagged ruby and postgres; add a spinach job that runs `rake spinach`, allows failure, runs on all refs except tags, and is tagged ruby and mysql. In the notify stage add a dockerhub job that runs `curl http://dockerhub/URL` on any branch, tagged ruby and postgres. In the deploy stage add a production job that runs `cap deploy production` and `cap notify` only on master or branches matching /^deploy-.*$/, tagged capistrano and debian, and a staging job that runs `cap deploy stating` on all refs except the stable branch, also tagged capistrano and debian.
